channel.title: Everpure, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Everpure, Inc. (everpure).

item.title: CVE-2026-6444 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: A flaw exists in the FlashArray Purity management interface where an authenticated low-privileged user may, under specific conditions, access functionality beyond their assigned privileges.

item.title: CVE-2026-6445 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: A flaw exists in FlashArray Purity where insufficient filtering of certain data paths could expose sensitive information to an authenticated user with low privileges.
